sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Welcome to our service. These terms govern your rights and obligations when using this website and related services. By using this service, you agree to all the terms contained herein.

sections.title: 2. User Account and Security
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account password. Please notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. We will not be liable for any loss arising from your failure to comply with this section.

sections.title: 3. Privacy Policy
sections.content: We value your privacy. Please refer to our Privacy Policy page for information on how we collect, use, and disclose your personal information.

sections.title: 4. Modifications and Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the service (or any part thereof) at any time without prior notice.
